# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

apiVersion: "2019-12-01"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
parameters:
  projectName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: devenv
    metadata:
      description: Project name used as prefix for all resources
  vmCount:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2
    minValue: 1
    maxValue: 10
    metadata:
      description: Number of developer VMs to create
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Administrator username for the VMs
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: Administrator password for the VMs
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_DS2_v2
    allowedValues:
      - Standard_DS1_v2
      - Standard_DS2_v2
      - Standard_DS3_v2
      - Standard_B2s
      - Standard_B2ms
    metadata:
      description: Size of the developer VMs
  osType:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Windows
    allowedValues:
      - Windows
      - Linux
    metadata:
      description: Operating system type for the VMs
  allowedSourceIPs:
    type: array
    defaultValue:
      - "*"
    metadata:
      description: Array of allowed source IP addresses or CIDR ranges for RDP/SSH access. Restrict this to your office/home IPs for security.
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources

variables:
  vnetName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vnet')]"
  vnetAddressPrefix: "10.0.0.0/16"
  subnetName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-subnet')]"
  subnetAddressPrefix: "10.0.1.0/24"
  nsgName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-nsg')]"
  windowsImageReference:
    publisher: MicrosoftWindowsDesktop
    offer: windows-11
    sku: win11-22h2-pro
    version: latest
  linuxImageReference:
    publisher: Canonical
    offer: 0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy
    sku: 22_04-lts-gen2
    version: latest
  imageReference: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), variables('windowsImageReference'), variables('linuxImageReference'))]"
  rdpPort: "3389"
  sshPort: "22"
  accessPort: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), variables('rdpPort'), variables('sshPort'))]"
  accessProtocol: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), 'RDP', 'SSH')]"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('nsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: "[concat('Allow-', variables('accessProtocol'), '-Inbound')]"
          properties:
            priority: 1000
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "[variables('accessPort')]"
            sourceAddressPrefixes: "[parameters('allowedSourceIPs')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: "[concat('Allow ', variables('accessProtocol'), ' access from specified IPs')]"
        - name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: Deny all other inbound traffic not explicitly allowed

  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[variables('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      subnets:
        - name: "[variables('subnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[variables('subnetAddressPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-pip')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: Standard
      tier: Regional
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: Static
      dnsSettings:
        domainNameLabel: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    copy:
      name: publicIPCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-nic')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName'))]"
      - publicIPCopy
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: ipconfig1
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))]"
            subnet:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
    copy:
      name: nicCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - nicCopy
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
      osProfile:
        computerName: "[concat('devvm', copyIndex(1))]"
        adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
        adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
        linuxConfiguration: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), json('{\"disablePasswordAuthentication\": false}'), json('null'))]"
      storageProfile:
        imageReference: "[variables('imageReference')]"
        osDisk:
          name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-osdisk')]"
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Premium_LRS
          diskSizeGB: 128
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-nic'))]"
      diagnosticsProfile:
        bootDiagnostics:
          enabled: true
    tags:
      environment: development
      managedBy: arm-template
      vmIndex: "[string(copyIndex(1))]"
    copy:
      name: vmCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '/autoShutdown')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    condition: "[equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows')]"
    dependsOn:
      - vmCopy
    properties:
      publisher: Microsoft.Compute
      type: CustomScriptExtension
      typeHandlerVersion: "1.10"
      autoUpgradeMinorVersion: true
      settings:
        commandToExecute: "powershell -Command \"Write-Output 'VM provisioned successfully'\""
    copy:
      name: extensionCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

  - type: Microsoft.DevTestLab/schedules
    apiVersion: "2018-09-15"
    name: "[concat('shutdown-computevm-', parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - vmCopy
    properties:
      status: Enabled
      taskType: ComputeVmShutdownTask
      dailyRecurrence:
        time: "1900"
      timeZoneId: UTC
      targetResourceId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1)))]"
      notificationSettings:
        status: Enabled
        timeInMinutes: 30
        notificationLocale: en
    copy:
      name: shutdownCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"

outputs:
  vmConnectionInfo:
    type: array
    copy:
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      input:
        vmName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1))]"
        publicIPAddress: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))).ipAddress]"
        fqdn: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))).dnsSettings.fqdn]"
        connectionCommand: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), concat('mstsc /v:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))).dnsSettings.fqdn), concat('ssh ', parameters('adminUsername'), '@', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm', copyIndex(1), '-pip'))).dnsSettings.fqdn))]"
  nsgName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('nsgName')]"
  securityNote:
    type: string
    value: "IMPORTANT: Update the allowedSourceIPs parameter to restrict access to known developer IP addresses. The auto-shutdown schedule is set to 7:00 PM UTC to reduce costs."
  vnetName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('vnetName')]"
